summary: Develop a complete online course with modular structure, multimedia content, engagement strategies, and quality assurance using established online learning standards.

inputs.name: course_topic
inputs.description: The subject matter and scope of the online course.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Learner demographics, prior knowledge, and technology access.

inputs.name: delivery_platform
inputs.description: LMS or platform for course delivery (Canvas, Moodle, etc.).

outputs.name: course_structure
outputs.description: Modular course outline with units, lessons, and navigation design.

outputs.name: content_plan
outputs.description: Multimedia content plan with accessibility considerations.

outputs.name: quality_checklist
outputs.description: Quality assurance checklist based on Quality Matters or equivalent standards.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is online course development, not face-to-face curriculum or website design.
Require course topic and target audience before design begins.
Output must include course structure, content plan, and quality checklist.

steps.action: Design modular course structure with units, lessons, and navigation.
Design instructional strategies, activities, and engagement approaches for each module.
Select and configure technology tools for content delivery and interaction.
Review all content and tools for accessibility compliance.
Apply quality assurance checklist and document compliance.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read platform requirements, course templates, and learner data.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save course structure, content plan, and quality checklist.

verification.method: Check that course has clear modular structure with units and lessons.
Check that accessibility review is documented for all content and tools.
Check that quality assurance checklist is fully completed.

success_criteria: Course structure is modular with clear unit and lesson boundaries.
All content and tools pass accessibility review.
Quality assurance checklist is complete with evidence documented.

rollback.when: If the course design ignores accessibility or lacks modular structure, discard and restart.
